import { Container, Grid } from '@material-ui/core' import React, { useState } from 'react' import SubjectCards from '../components/SubjectCards' export default function StudentDashboard() { const [subjects, setSubjects] = useState([ { title: 'Web Development', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'Phil Cajurao', id: 1 }, { title: 'Web Design', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'Nicolas Sumagaysay', id: 2 }, { title: 'JavaScript Programming', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'Phil Cajurao', id: 3 }, { title: 'Calculus', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'Jomari Dacles', id: 4 }, { title: 'Arduino', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'Jomari Dacles', id: 5 }, { title: 'Numerical Methods', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'Jomari Dacles', id: 6 }, { title: 'Engineering Basics', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'Phil Cajurao', id: 7 }, { title: 'Graphic Designing', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'Nicolas Sumagaysay', id: 8 }, { title: 'Pyhton Programming', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'Phil Cajurao', id: 9 }, { title: 'Art App', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'Nicolas Sumagaysay', id: 10 }, ]) return (
{subjects.map(subject => ( ))}
) }
